First metric on last stage is 60.30. Setting a modest target of 62 and providing specific untried optimization hints. The agent achieved ~2.4% speedup with Triton ReLU but convolutions dominate. Two concrete untried approaches remain: cudnn.benchmark auto-tuning and BN(affine=False)+Triton affine+ReLU fusion.

nudges.text: Don't finalize at 1.03x — there's significant room to improve. Two high-leverage ideas: (1) Convert tensors to `torch.channels_last` memory format (`.to(memory_format=torch.channels_last)`) which often speeds up MIOpen convolutions significantly on AMD GPUs. (2) Fuse the BN2 + residual add + final ReLU into a single Triton kernel (`out = max(bn2_out + identity, 0)`) to eliminate a full memory round-trip, since that's three separate kernel launches currently.
